# Resizer Lab

> Free, browser-based image resizer. Resize, compress, and convert JPG, PNG, and WebP images without uploads — all processing happens locally in your browser for full privacy.

Resizer Lab is a privacy-first online image tool. There are no accounts, no uploads, and no server-side processing. The site also publishes long-form guides and tutorials on image optimization, formats, and best practices for web, social media, and e-commerce.

## Pages

- [Home / Image Resizer](/): Drag-and-drop image resizer with presets, percentage scaling, and JPG/PNG/WebP output.
- [Interactive Image Resizer](/image-resizer): Visual resize editor with draggable handles, presets, and custom dimensions.
- [Image Size Presets](/gallery): Quick-pick preset sizes (256, 512, 720, 1080) with use-case guidance.
- [Guides](/guides): Tutorials and learning paths for image optimization, compression, and platform sizing.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on image resizing, compression, formats, SEO, and social media sizing.
- [About](/about): What Resizer Lab is and how the privacy-first architecture works.
- [Contact](/contact): Support and feedback.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
